story: US-006 / PLAN.md P1 — 12-class action-recognition accuracy gate
reproducible: Deterministic: frozen best.pt (training stopped at epoch 10) + participant-grouped split (split_seed 42, assert_no_leakage) + eval phase deterministic centers. Re-running `ETRI_CLASS_MAP=pipeline/etri_actions.csv python src/eval.py --checkpoint runs/baseline12/best.pt --split test` yields the same numbers.
split_detail: cross-subject; train={P01,P04,P06,P07,P08,P10,P11,P12,P13,P15,P16,P17,P19,P20} val={P03,P05,P18} test={P02,P09,P14}; no participant leakage (splits.py assert_no_leakage).
remap: ETRI_CLASS_MAP active during eval (55->12 via env-gated src/dataset.py edit); n_classes_present=12 confirms.
early_stop_rationale: configs/p1_12class.yaml set epochs:20 (a config default, not the gate). The P1 gate is a FLOOR (>=0.40); val converged to ~0.70 acc / ~0.63 macro-F1 by epoch 7-10 (val_f1 0.449->0.636 over 10 epochs). Training was deliberately stopped at epoch 10 to (a) freeze a reproducible checkpoint for evidence integrity and (b) respect the Ralph iteration budget. The floor gate is met by a >70% margin; additional epochs would only marginally improve a model that already clears the gate.
